_publications._publicationTitle: Unmasking Intra-tumoral Heterogeneity and Clonal Evolution in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: We next performed a copy number analysis of the three biopsy sites...Distinct copy number signatures can be appreciated in each of the three samples further illustrating intra-tumoral heterogeneity.
details: Successfully performed copy number analysis revealing distinct copy number signatures in each of the three tumor samples, demonstrating intra-tumoral heterogeneity
